text: Alif, Lām, Meem.
tl: Alif-Laaam-Meeem

text: [This is] the revelation of the Book about which there is no doubt from the Lord of the worlds.
tl: Tanzeelul Kitaabi laa raiba feehi mir rabbil 'aalameen

text: Or do they say, \"He invented it\"? Rather, it is the truth from your Lord, [O Muḥammad], that you may warn a people to whom no warner has come before you [so] perhaps they will be guided.
tl: Am yaqooloonaf taraahu bal huwal haqqu mir rabbika litunzira qawma maaa ataahum min nazeerim min qablika la'allahum yahtadoon

text: It is Allāh who created the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them in six days; then He established Himself above the Throne. You have not besides Him any protector or any intercessor; so will you not be reminded?
tl: Allaahul lazee khalaqas samaawaati wal-arda Wa-maa bainahumaa fee sittati ayyaamin thummas tawaa 'alal 'arsh; maa lakum min doonihee minw waliyyinw wala shafee'; afalaa tatazakkaroon

text: He arranges [each] matter from the heaven to the earth; then it will ascend to Him in a Day, the extent of which is a thousand years of those which you count.
tl: Yudabbirul amra minas samaaa'i ilal ardi thumma ya'ruju ilaihi fee yawmin kaana miqdaaruhooo alfa sanatim mimmaa ta'uddoon

text: That is the Knower of the unseen and the witnessed, the Exalted in Might, the Merciful,
tl: Zaalika 'aalimul ghaybi Wa-shahaadatil 'azeezur raheem

text: Who perfected everything which He created and began the creation of man from clay.
tl: Allazee ahsana kulla shai-in khalaqa; Wa-bada-a khalqal insaani min teen

text: Then He made his posterity out of the extract of a liquid disdained.
tl: Thumma ja'ala naslahoo min sulaalatim mim maaa'im maheen

text: Then He proportioned him and breathed into him from His [created] soul and made for you hearing and vision and hearts [i.e., intellect]; little are you grateful.
tl: Thumma sawwaahu Wa-nafakha feehi mir roohihih; Wa-ja'ala lakumus sam'a wal-absaara wal-af'idah; qaleelam maa tashkuroon

text: And they say, \"When we are lost [i.e., disintegrated] within the earth, will we indeed be [recreated] in a new creation?\" Rather, they are, in the meeting with their Lord, disbelievers.
tl: Wa-qaalooo 'a-izaa dalalnaa fil ardi 'a-innaa lafee khalqin jadeed; bal hum biliqaaa'i rabbihim kaafiroon

text: Say, \"The angel of death who has been entrusted with you will take you. Then to your Lord you will be returned.\"
tl: Qul yatawaffaakum malakul mawtil lazee wukkila bikum Thumma ilaa rabbikum turja'oon

text: If you could but see when the criminals are hanging their heads before their Lord, [saying], \"Our Lord, we have seen and heard, so return us [to the world]; we will work righteousness. Indeed, we are [now] certain.\"
tl: Wa-law taraaa izil mujrimoona naakisoo ru'oosihim 'inda rabbihim rabbanaaa absarnaa Wa-sami'naa farji'naa na'mal saalihan innaa mooqinoon

text: And if We had willed, We could have given every soul its guidance, but the word from Me will come into effect [that] \"I will surely fill Hell with jinn and people all together.
tl: Wa-law shi'naa la-aatainaa kulla nafsin hudaahaa Wa-laakin haqqal qawlu minnee la-amla'anna jahannama minal jinnati wannaasi ajma'een

text: So taste [punishment] because you forgot the meeting of this, your Day; indeed, We have [accordingly] forgotten you. And taste the punishment of eternity for what you used to do.\"
tl: Fazooqoo bimaa naseetum liqaaa'a yawminkum haaza innaa naseenaakum Wa-zooqoo 'azaabal khuldi bimaa kuntum ta'maloon

text: Only those believe in Our verses who, when they are reminded by them, fall down in prostration and exalt [Allāh] with praise of their Lord, and they are not arrogant.
tl: Innamaa yu'minu bi-aayaatinal lazeena izaa zukkiroo bihaa kharroo sujjadanw Wa-sabbahoo bihamdi rabbihim Wa-hum laa yastakbiroon

text: Their sides part [i.e., they arise] from [their] beds; they supplicate their Lord in fear and aspiration, and from what We have provided them, they spend.
tl: Tatajaafaa junoobuhum 'anil madaaji'i yad'oona rabbahum khawfanw Wa-tama'anw Wa-mimmaa razaqnaahum yunfiqoon

text: And no soul knows what has been hidden for them of comfort for eyes [i.e., satisfaction] as reward for what they used to do.
tl: Falaa ta'lamu nafsum maaa ukhfiya lahum min qurrati a'yunin jazaaa'am bimaa kaanoo ya'maloon

text: Then is one who was a believer like one who was defiantly disobedient? They are not equal.
tl: Afaman kaana mu'minan kaman kaana faasiqaa; laa yasta-woon

text: As for those who believed and did righteous deeds, for them will be the Gardens of Refuge as accommodation for what they used to do.
tl: Ammal lazeena aamanoo Wa-'amilus saalihaati falahum jannaatul ma'waa nuzulam bimaa kaanoo ya'maloon

text: But as for those who defiantly disobeyed, their refuge is the Fire. Every time they wish to emerge from it, they will be returned to it while it is said to them, \"Taste the punishment of the Fire which you used to deny.\"
tl: Wa-ammal lazeena fasaqoo fama'waahumun Naaru kullamaaa araadooo any yakhrujoo minhaaa u'eedoo feehaa Wa-qeela lahum zooqoo 'azaaaban Naaril lazee kuntum bihee tukazziboon

text: And We will surely let them taste the nearer punishment short of the greater punishment that perhaps they will return [i.e., repent].
tl: Wa-lanuzeeqan-nahum minal 'azaabil ladnaa doonal 'azaabil akbari la'allahum yarji'oon

text: And who is more unjust than one who is reminded of the verses of his Lord; then he turns away from them? Indeed We, from the criminals, will take retribution.
tl: Wa-man azlamu mimman zukkira bi-aayaati rabbihee summa a'rada 'anhaa; innaa minal mujrimeena muntaqimoon

text: And We certainly gave Moses the Scripture, so do not be in doubt over his meeting. And We made it [i.e., the Torah] guidance for the Children of Israel.
tl: Wa-laqad aatainaa Moosal Kitaaba falaa takun fee miryatim mil liqaaa'ihee Wa-ja'alnaahu hudal li-Baneee Israaa'eel

text: And We made from among them leaders guiding by Our command when they were patient and [when] they were certain of Our signs.
tl: Wa-ja'alnaa minhum a'immataien yahdoona bi-amrinaa lammaa sabaroo Wa-kaanoo bi-aayaatinaa yooqinoon

text: Indeed, your Lord will judge between them on the Day of Resurrection concerning that over which they used to differ.
tl: Inna rabbaka huwa yafsilu bainahum yawmal qiyaamati feemaa kaanoo feehi yakhtalifoon

text: Has it not become clear to them how many generations We destroyed before them, [as] they walk among their dwellings? Indeed in that are signs; then do they not hear?
tl: Awalam yahdi lahum kam ahlaknaa min qablihim minal qurooni yamshoona fee masaakinihim; inna fee zaalika la-aayaatin afalaa yasma'oon

text: Have they not seen that We drive water [in clouds] to barren land and bring forth thereby crops from which their livestock eat and [they] themselves? Then do they not see?
tl: Awalam yaraw annaa nasooqul maaa'a ilal ardil juruzi fanukhriju bihee zar'an ta'kulu minhu an'aamuhum Wa-anfusuhum afalaa yubsiroon

text: And they say, \"When will be this conquest, if you should be truthful?\"
tl: Wa-yaqooloona mataa haazal fath-hu in kuntum saadiqeen

text: Say, [O Muḥammad], \"On the Day of Conquest the belief of those who had disbelieved will not benefit them, nor will they be reprieved.\"
tl: Qul yawmal fath-hi laa yanfa'ul lazeena kafarooo eemaanuhum Wa-laa hum yunzaroon

text: So turn away from them and wait. Indeed, they are waiting.
tl: Fa-a'rid 'anhum wantazir innahum muntaziroon
